summary: Verified P1 fixes: (1) Career rating recomputation using engine's wpa_to_rating; (2) Momentum chart innings-break divider. Both features working end-to-end.

verifications.profile_endpoint: career.avg_rating=6.63 for V Kohli matches list career_rating; career.avg_wpa present (0.0172); avg_batting/avg_bowling aggregated same way.
verifications.frontend_players_page: Players list shows 6.6 for V Kohli tile; PlayerProfile badge [data-testid=player-career-rating] displays 6.6 - consistent with API.
verifications.momentum_divider: For match 1535465 (GT vs RCB) and 1359487 (GT vs KKR): ReferenceLine count=1, label 'Innings break' visible as dashed vertical line at innings-1→2 transition. Main WP curve renders smoothly across both innings. Screenshots captured.
verifications.regression_live_page: Live page loads for both historical (1535465) and featured (1359487, Rinku's 5 Sixes curated) matches. Impact board renders. Time Machine tag visible.

context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 career-rating and innings-break-divider fixes both verified. Screenshots at /app/momentum_1535465.png, /app/momentum_1359487.png, /app/profile.png. WhySheet click regression was not re-verified in-depth (out of scope; prior iterations confirmed).
